sections.paragraph:
τιμάω [τιμή]

—1. ‘have special regard for’, honor, father or mother Mt 15:4 al.; Paul and company Ac 28:10; widows 1 Ti 5:3; pers. in general and the (Roman) emperor 1 Pt 2:17. Of regard for God Mt 15:8 and for the Father and the Son J 5:23; of the Son’s regard for the Father 8:49; of the Father’s regard for one in service to the Son 12:26.

—2. ‘put a monetary value on’, to price a thing or pers. Mt 27:9.
